contract.payment_cadence: per ordering period (annual February–January cycle); FFP per aircraft, per training course, per deployment; T&M for NRE extensions; Travel reimbursable per FTR
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Operations and Training Support: Mission Days (30 @ $2,850 × 5 periods = $427.5K), Operational/Testing Support (6 @ $6,000 × 5 = $180K), Operator/Observer Training (1 @ $6,000 × 5 = $30K), Instructor Training (1 @ $600 × 5 = $3K), Course Development (Operator/Observer @ $6K × 5 = $30K, Instructor @ $6K × 5 = $30K)
Travel for Operational Support: NTE $50,000 per ordering period × 5 periods = $250,000 (FTR-compliant per Section 5.3)

Non-recurring Engineering: Technical Documentation of Software/Hardware Development (NTE $66K × 5 = $330K), Modeling (NTE $66K × 5 = $330K), NHC operational workflow integration (NTE $66K × 5 = $330K)
